title: Egg Teleport
description: With the Egg Teleport plugin, you can use the egg as an option to teleport yourself. It works like an ender pearl.
body:
![PrideTuve Logo](https://primary.jwwb.nl/public/s/l/t/temp-zwkyqrxattdguhclibtl/kopievonpride14545-1.png)
# Egg Teleport Plugin
**With the Egg Teleport plugin, you can use the egg as an option to teleport yourself. It works like an ender pearl.**
